metadata.prerequisite-env-vars: PULUMI_ACCESS_TOKEN, PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE, GCP_PROJECT (=minivess-mlops), DVC_S3_ENDPOINT_URL, DVC_S3_ACCESS_KEY, DVC_S3_SECRET_KEY, DVC_S3_BUCKET (=minivess-dvc-data), HF_TOKEN, RUNPOD_API_KEY (for Phase 5 only), GITHUB_TOKEN (for GHCR push if needed)

task.name: Destroy GCP Pulumi stack

commands.cmd: pulumi destroy -y 2>&1 || echo "Destroy failed or no stack"

task.on-failure: If Cloud SQL stuck in PENDING_DELETE (up to 7 days): - gcloud sql instances list --project=minivess-mlops - Wait or use different instance name in Pulumi config If Pulumi state corrupted: - pulumi refresh -y (sync state with actual GCP) - Then retry pulumi destroy -y
task.acceptance: 0 instances, 0 Cloud Run services. GCS buckets may take time to delete.

task.name: Destroy ALL SkyPilot clusters
task.acceptance: 0 clusters.

phase.name: Prerequisites — Env Vars, APIs, Quota, Credentials

task.name: Verify ALL required env vars are set

commands.cmd: for var in PULUMI_ACCESS_TOKEN PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE \ DVC_S3_ENDPOINT_URL DVC_S3_ACCESS_KEY DVC_S3_SECRET_KEY HF_TOKEN; do [ -z "${!var}" ] && echo "MISSING: $var" || echo "OK: $var" done

task.acceptance: ALL vars show OK. Zero MISSING.

task.name: Enable GCP APIs (idempotent)

commands.cmd: gcloud services enable \ compute.googleapis.com \ storage.googleapis.com \ iam.googleapis.com \ run.googleapis.com \ sqladmin.googleapis.com \ artifactregistry.googleapis.com \ secretmanager.googleapis.com \ --project=minivess-mlops

task.acceptance: All APIs enabled (idempotent — safe to run multiple times).

task.name: Verify GPU quota

commands.cmd: gcloud compute regions describe us-central1 --project=minivess-mlops \ --format="value(quotas[name=GPUS_ALL_REGIONS].limit)" 2>/dev/null || \ echo "Check GPU quota manually at https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas"

task.on-failure: Request GPU quota at: https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas?project=minivess-mlops Filter: GPUS_ALL_REGIONS. Request >= 1. Approval takes 5-30 min.
task.acceptance: GPUS_ALL_REGIONS >= 1.

task.name: Verify SkyPilot GCP enabled
task.acceptance: "GCP: enabled [compute, storage]"

task.name: Verify DVC data exists in UpCloud S3

commands.cmd: uv run dvc status -r upcloud 2>&1 || echo "DVC remote not configured — run: uv run python scripts/configure_dvc_remote.py"

task.on-failure: If DVC remote not configured: uv run python scripts/configure_dvc_remote.py If data not pushed: dvc push -r upcloud
task.acceptance: DVC shows data is up to date on upcloud remote.

task.name: Verify smoke test split file exists
task.acceptance: File exists with 4 volumes.

task.name: Configure Docker auth for GAR
task.acceptance: Docker configured for GAR.

phase.name: Pulumi Up — GCP Stack (WITHOUT Cloud Run)
phase.description: Deploy: Cloud SQL, 3 GCS buckets, GAR registry, IAM service accounts, Secret Manager. Cloud Run MLflow is DEFERRED — deployed in Phase 1.5 after MLflow Docker image is built.

task.name: Deploy GCP infrastructure
task.acceptance: Outputs include: db_connection_name, db_public_ip, mlflow_artifacts_bucket, dvc_data_bucket, checkpoints_bucket, docker_registry, region. NOTE: mlflow_url will NOT appear yet (Cloud Run deferred).

phase.name: Build + Deploy Cloud Run MLflow
phase.description: THE BLOCKER: Cloud Run MLflow is deferred in Pulumi because it needs a custom Docker image with psycopg2-binary + google-cloud-storage. Build it, push to GAR, then un-defer and redeploy.

task.name: Build MLflow Docker image for Cloud Run

commands.cmd: # If Dockerfile.mlflow doesn't exist, create it: # FROM ghcr.io/mlflow/mlflow:v3.10.0 # RUN pip install psycopg2-binary google-cloud-storage boto3

task.acceptance: Image built with psycopg2 + GCS support.

task.name: Un-defer Cloud Run in Pulumi and redeploy
task.description: Set _CLOUD_RUN_DEFERRED = False in __main__.py. Then pulumi up to deploy Cloud Run MLflow with the GAR image.
task.acceptance: MLflow Cloud Run returns HTTP 200. pulumi stack output mlflow_url is non-empty.

task.name: Update .env with MLflow URL

commands.cmd: MLFLOW_URL=$(cd deployment/pulumi/gcp && pulumi stack output mlflow_url)

task.acceptance: .env has MLFLOW_GCP_URI set to Cloud Run URL.

phase.name: Docker Training Image Build + Push to GAR

task.name: Build Docker base image (GPU)
task.acceptance: docker images minivess-base:latest shows fresh timestamp.

task.name: Verify Docker image contents

commands.cmd: docker run --rm minivess-base:latest python -c " from minivess.config.models import TrainingConfig c = TrainingConfig() print(f'mixed_precision_val={c.mixed_precision_val}') import subprocess; subprocess.run(['dvc', 'version'], check=True) import mlflow; print(f'mlflow={mlflow.__version__}') import yaml cfg = yaml.safe_load(open('configs/splits/smoke_test_1fold_4vol.json').read() if False else '[]') print('configs accessible') "

task.acceptance: mixed_precision_val=False, dvc available, mlflow importable, configs present.

task.name: Tag and push to GAR

commands.cmd: GAR_REPO=$(cd deployment/pulumi/gcp && pulumi stack output docker_registry)

task.acceptance: GAR shows base:latest with fresh CREATE_TIME.

phase.name: GCP 4-Model Training on L4 Spot
phase.description:
Sequential launch: sam3_vanilla → dynunet → sam3_hybrid → vesselfm. GPU quota = 1, so MUST be sequential. BETWEEN EACH MODEL: verify previous model FINISHED with finite val_loss. If ANY model fails → SYSTEM FAILURE → diagnose with ralph-loop → fix → retry.
CRITICAL CHECKS PER MODEL: 1. SkyPilot provisions L4 (not T4 — T4 banned) 2. Docker image pulled from GAR 3. DVC data pulled in setup 4. Training completes (FINISHED, not FAILED) 5. val_loss is FINITE (not NaN, not Inf) 6. Artifacts uploaded to GCS via MLflow multipart 7. VM auto-destroyed after completion

task.name: Train sam3_vanilla

commands.cmd: gcloud compute instances list --project=minivess-mlops # verify 0 instances

task.verification: Wait for cluster to auto-destroy. Then: curl MLflow /api/2.0/mlflow/experiments/search → new experiment. curl MLflow /api/2.0/mlflow/runs/search → FINISHED, finite val_loss.
task.ralph-loop: Monitor. On failure: capture logs BEFORE auto-destroy, diagnose, fix, retry.

task.name: Train sam3_hybrid
task.description: CRITICAL: GCP YAML auto-selects smoke_sam3_hybrid_cloud.yaml (val_interval=1). Verify in MLflow: max_epochs=2, mixed_precision=False. If val_loss=NaN, CHECK which experiment config was used (the sentinel bug).

task.name: Train vesselfm
task.description: VesselFM: patch Z≥32 required (5 stride-2 downsamplings). Fix is in Docker image. Previous failure was SSH error (transient). This MUST pass on GCP.

task.name: Verify ALL 4 models in MLflow

commands.cmd: curl -s "$MLFLOW_URL/api/2.0/mlflow/experiments/search" | python3 -c " import json, sys, math d = json.load(sys.stdin) for e in d['experiments']: runs = ... # query runs for each experiment # Verify: FINISHED + finite val_loss "

task.acceptance: 4/4 models: FINISHED status, finite val_loss. sam3_topolora excluded (needs A100, hardware limitation).

task.name: Verify GCS artifacts
task.acceptance: Checkpoint .pth files and config artifacts present.

task.name: Sync mlruns to local
task.note: Excludes large .pth and .onnx files to keep sync fast. Full checkpoint sync: remove -x flag. MLflow directory structure from Cloud Run artifact proxy may differ from local mlruns/ structure — verify compatibility.
task.acceptance: mlruns/cloud/ has experiment directories with metrics and params.

phase.name: RunPod Dev Workflow
phase.description: SECONDARY priority. RunPod = dev environment for academic paper. Tests: SkyPilot launch → DVC pull → train → filesystem mlruns → sync back. Uses file-based MLflow (no Cloud Run needed).

task.name: Launch + train sam3_vanilla on RunPod
task.acceptance: Training completes. mlruns/ on RunPod has experiment.

task.name: Sync RunPod mlruns to local

commands.cmd: CLUSTER=$(uv run sky status --format json | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[0]['name'])")

task.acceptance: mlruns/runpod/ has experiment from RunPod training.

tdd-spec.red: test_mlflow_cloud_run_health: curl MLFLOW_GCP_URI/health → 200 test_gar_image_exists: gcloud artifacts list → image present test_dvc_remote_accessible: dvc status -r upcloud → up to date test_gcs_buckets_exist: gsutil ls → 3 buckets test_skypilot_gcp_enabled: sky check gcp → enabled test_env_vars_complete: all required vars in .env

task.name: Add environment priority to CLAUDE.md
task.description: Add to root CLAUDE.md and deployment/CLAUDE.md: "Environment Priority: GCP prod/staging = PRIMARY. RunPod dev = SECONDARY. NEVER prioritize RunPod over GCP. NEVER ask which env to test."

task.name: Write system verification report
task.description: Document: every component tested, every model trained, every artifact synced. Include MLflow experiment IDs, GCS bucket contents, timing, costs.

task.name: COST CONTROL — Destroy or keep infra
task.description: Cloud SQL costs ~$0.80/day. Cloud Run MLflow costs ~$0.10/day (scale to zero). DECIDE: keep running (for continued development) or pulumi destroy. If keeping: set GCP budget alert at $20/month.

cost-summary.total: ~$5-10 first day, ~$2-5/day ongoing if infra kept running

execution-notes.note: Phase 1.5 (Cloud Run MLflow) is THE critical new addition — without it, nothing works.
GCP prod/staging is PRIMARY. RunPod dev is SECONDARY.
DESTROY EVERYTHING first — test as a new user would.
If ANY phase fails → SYSTEM FAILURE → fix before proceeding.
Sequential model launches on GCP (quota = 1 GPU).
BETWEEN each model: verify FINISHED + finite val_loss before launching next.
ralph-loop monitors all cloud phases autonomously.
sam3_topolora excluded (needs A100 — hardware, not system bug).
After Phase 7: REMEMBER to pulumi destroy if not continuing development.
